introSection:
Spur & The Big Apple is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Verkeers- en Attractiepark Duinen Zathe in Appelscha, Friesland, Netherlands.

This roller coaster opened with the park in its current location in 2002. It previously operated at the park in its previous location, though the opening date isn't known.

sections.title: External links
sections.content: * YouTube video containing footage of the ride

fullText:
Spur & The Big Apple is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Verkeers- en Attractiepark Duinen Zathe in Appelscha, Friesland, Netherlands.

This roller coaster opened with the park in its current location in 2002. It previously operated at the park in its previous location, though the opening date isn't known.


 * YouTube video containing footage of the ride
